name: LC Hot100
summary: Offline LeetCode Hot100 study assistant for Rokid AR glasses
description: LC Hot100 is a voice-first app designed to help you study LeetCode Hot100 problems offline on Rokid AR glasses. It provides an interactive learning experience without requiring a phone.
author: bcefghj

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About
LC Hot100 is a voice-first learning app for studying the LeetCode Hot100 problem set offline on Rokid AR glasses.

## Key features
- Offline access to LeetCode Hot100 problems
- Voice-driven interaction optimized for AR glasses

## Requirements
- Designed specifically for Rokid AR glasses
- No phone connection required
